entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tid` INTEGER NOT NULL, `filePath` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `space` TEXT NOT NULL, `monthFolder` TEXT NOT NULL, `lastModified` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isEncrypted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `parentId` INTEGER, `isPinned` INTEGER NOT NULL, `todoState` TEXT NOT NULL, `metaEncrypted` INTEGER NOT NULL, `contentPreview` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`tid`))

indices.name: index_entries_filePath
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_entries_filePath` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`filePath`)

indices.name: index_entries_space_monthFolder
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_entries_space_monthFolder` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`space`, `monthFolder`)

indices.name: index_entries_space_type
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_entries_space_type` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`space`, `type`)

indices.name: index_entries_parentId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_entries_parentId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`parentId`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tid` INTEGER NOT NULL, `targetTid` INTEGER NOT NULL, `filePath` TEXT NOT NULL, `space` TEXT NOT NULL, `contentPreview` TEXT NOT NULL, `lastModified` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isEncrypted` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`tid`))

indices.name: index_comments_filePath
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_comments_filePath` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`filePath`)

indices.name: index_comments_targetTid
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_comments_targetTid` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`targetTid`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tid` INTEGER NOT NULL, `tag` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`tid`, `tag`), FOREIGN KEY(`tid`) REFERENCES `entries`(`tid`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_tags_tag
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_tags_tag` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tag`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `tid` INTEGER NOT NULL, `due` TEXT NOT NULL, `state` TEXT NOT NULL, `trigger` TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`tid`) REFERENCES `entries`(`tid`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_events_tid
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_events_tid` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tid`)

indices.name: index_events_due
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_events_due` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`due`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`contentPreview` TEXT NOT NULL, `monthFolder` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`entries`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_entries_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `entries` BEGIN DELETE FROM `entries_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_entries_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `entries` BEGIN DELETE FROM `entries_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_entries_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `entries` BEGIN INSERT INTO `entries_fts`(`docid`, `contentPreview`, `monthFolder`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`contentPreview`, NEW.`monthFolder`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_entries_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `entries` BEGIN INSERT INTO `entries_fts`(`docid`, `contentPreview`, `monthFolder`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`contentPreview`, NEW.`monthFolder`); END
